dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The governance-context-builder step failed due to a JSON parse error, indicating that the agent was unable to successfully structure or apply governance rules to the context.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The architecture-work-assessment step completed successfully with schema validation, processing a high volume of tokens (44,577), which suggests a comprehensive analysis of the architectural impact.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: While the main assessment succeeded, the failure of the governance context builder likely limited the agent's ability to analyze tensions specifically related to governance constraints, though general architectural trade-offs were likely addressed in the final assessment.
